figures.caption: Figure 1: Overview of Wan-Streamer. It models language, audio, and video as both input and output within a single Transformer, using block-causal attention for incremental streaming generation.

Figure 2: Thinker-performer overlap during streaming inference. At unit kk, the thinker encodes the current user observations uku_{k}, updates the KV cache, and decodes the previous response latents yk鈭?/mo>1y_{k-1} for immediate emission.
